While their Net Run Rate offers a crucial advantage, top-order batting instability is a growing concern. One more win could secure their spot, but avoiding a late collapse against tough upcoming opponents is vital for a smooth qualification. RCB still look like a strong playoff contender, but unless they rediscover consistency quickly, the final stretch of the league phase could become far tighter than it currently appears.

'Vomited major toxin’: How rat poison inside watermelon led to death of 4 in Mumbai
description: Rat poison, specifically zinc phosphide, has been identified as the cause of death for four members of the Dokadia family in Mumbai. Forensic tests confirmed the poison was inside the watermelon they consumed. Police are now investigating whether the incident was accidental, suicidal, or homicidal, examining all possibilities.

title: Sandeep Pathak moves HC, seeks details of Punjab Police FIRs, protections from arrest
Joe Senser dies at 69 as unanswered questions surround final chapter of his life
description: Former Minnesota Vikings tight end Joe Senser has passed away at 69. Senser, a Pro Bowler and the only Vikings tight end to achieve over 1,000 receiving yards in a season, died on May 7th. The cause of death remains unknown, though he had been dealing with the aftermath of a severe stroke suffered in 2016.

title: Watch: Muslim jail officer marries ex-murder convict; 'kanyadaan' performed by Bajrang Dal leader
description: An assistant jail superintendent and a former life convict, who met while he was serving his sentence at Satna Central Jail, have married. Their love story, which began with official interactions, culminated in a Hindu wedding ceremony in Chhatarpur district, becoming a local sensation.

title: 50 seconds, 8 bullets: Cops hunt 4 hired killers after Suvendu aide’s murder
description: Siliguri police detained a vehicle owner after his car's registration number was linked to the murder of Suvendu Adhikari's personal assistant. Investigators found the number plate was fake, and the owner had advertised the car for sale online. Meanwhile, a seized motorbike also had a fake number plate and erased chassis number, complicating the hunt for its owner.

DMK to prop up ADMK govt in TN? Stalin will take call; EPS likely to meet guv with claim today
description: The legislators left the decision to Stalin, multiple sources told TOI. AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami, meanwhile, is understood to have sought governor R V Arlekar’s appointment on Friday.

title: Another day, another statement victory for Gukesh in rapid chess
Bengaluru road rage: IAF officer, wife allege assault by auto driver
description: An Indian Air Force officer and his wife were allegedly assaulted in a road rage incident near Jalahalli Cross after requesting an auto driver to make way. The altercation escalated, with the officer reportedly being attacked with a tree branch and both individuals being chased and hit by a group of men.

title: Arjun Erigaisi loses TePe Sigeman title to Magnus Carlsen in sudden-death tie-break
Railway cop tied to pole, lynched by mob in police presence for rape bid
description: A railway constable was lynched by a mob on Thursday in Bhubaneswar after allegedly attempting to rape a woman. The incident, captured on video, saw the deceased tied to a pole before being declared dead at the hospital. Police have arrested four individuals and are identifying others involved.

title: One year after Operation Sindoor, how India is still keeping Pakistan under pressure
description: India's Operation Sindoor, though its kinetic phase has ended, continues to exert pressure on Pakistan. Following successful strikes on terror infrastructure and air defenses, India remains vigilant, ready to retaliate against any future provocations. Beyond military action, diplomatic and economic measures are actively impacting Islamabad, ensuring Pakistan remains militarily unbalanced and countering its narrative.

Kyle Loftis death sparks questions months after major crash
description: Kyle Loftis, founder of 1320Video, died Tuesday night, according to the platform’s official statement. His cause of death has not been confirmed yet. Loftis helped build one of the biggest motorsports media brands online through street racing and automotive content. Fans, racers, and creators across social media continue sharing tributes and remembering his influence on modern car culture.

title: 'You have 10 working days to voluntarily recognise unions': Google UK staff tells company
description: Google's DeepMind employees are demanding union recognition amid concerns over their AI technology's use by the US and Israeli militaries. Workers seek a commitment against developing AI weapons and surveillance tools, urging management to voluntarily recognize their unions or face legal action. The move highlights growing anxieties about AI's ethical implications and its potential for harm.

title: Nvidia share falls to zero in China; CEO says latest chips shouldn’t reach Beijing
description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declared America a priority for advanced chip sales, stating China should not have access to the "latest and greatest" AI technology. However, he urged the US not to abandon the Chinese market entirely, arguing that global sales and increased tax revenues strengthen American economic and national security.

title: Simone Biles open up on therapy as Jonathan Owens eyes NFL return
description: Simone Biles opens up about her mental health struggles following the Tokyo Olympics, reflecting on the pressure that led her to step away from competition. In a recent interview, the Olympic champion shared how the experience changed her perspective on strength and vulnerability. Two years later, Biles continues to focus on her well-being while keeping her future in gymnastics open, including a possible return for the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles.
